reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para descansar lastima que no tiene gnc .
Debería haber gnc a mitad de camino entre santiago del estero y cordoba capital.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to rest, it's a shame it doesn't have CNG.
There should be a CNG station halfway between Santiago del Estero and Córdoba city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dHNiZF93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. La señora que atiende el cafe muy mala onda. Una sola chica para cargar nafta. Muy lento.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The woman serving coffee was very unfriendly. There was only one girl at the gas pump. Very slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1NXB6UjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando estuve no tenian gas oil y lo peor el resturante que era muy bueno no existe mas .

(Translated by Google)
When I was there they didn't have diesel fuel and the worst part is that the restaurant, which used to be very good, no longer exists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1aHZfR013EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre ,los baños una mugre ,la atención lamentable ,hasta pedimos una rejilla para poder sentarnos a comer

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, the bathrooms were filthy, the service was appalling, we even had to ask for a grate so we could sit down to eat
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cXFmNzd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Clásico lugar para estirar las piernas. El Sanguche esta bueno pero los precios son terribles de altos.

(Translated by Google)
Classic spot to stretch your legs. The sandwich is good, but the prices are terribly high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1MHJUOG5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
No pude cargar Infinia. Sólo contaban con súper.
No pude usar la App para abonar.
Entiendo que ambos problemas no son responsabilidad de la administración de la estación. Pero la decepción no me permite ser objetivo para evaluar otros aspectos.

(Translated by Google)
I couldn't fill up with Infinia. They only had Super.
I couldn't use the app to pay.
I understand that neither of these problems is the responsibility of the station management. But my disappointment prevents me from being objective in evaluating other aspects.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1b3Bfc0VBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar más. Te venden el combustible que quieren porque no tenés más opción que comprar.

(Translated by Google)
Just another place. They sell you whatever fuel they want because you have no other option but to buy it.
